# React + Vite Project Setup Complete This project has been converted to React with Vite. The original `index.html` is deprecated. ## Getting Started 1. Install dependencies: ``` npm install ``` 2. Start the development server: ``` npm run dev ``` 3. Build for production: ``` npm run build ``` ## Project Structure - `src/` - React source files - `App.jsx` - Main React component - `main.jsx` - React entry point - `App.css` - Component styles - `public/` - Static assets - `index.html` - HTML template - `vite.config.js` - Vite configuration Your app is now ready to run! color: #e0e0f8; font-style: italic; } .main-content { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px; padding: 30px; } @media (max-width: 1024px) { .main-content { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } } .panel { background: #f8f9fa; border-radius: 10px; padding: 25px; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; } .panel h2 { color: #333; margin-bottom: 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-size: 1.4em; } .panel h3 { color: #555; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 12px; font-size: 1.1em; } .icon { font-size: 1.3em; } textarea, input[type="text"], select { width: 100%; padding: 12px; margin-bottom: 15px; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 6px; font-family: 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 1em; resize: vertical; } textarea { min-height: 120px; } button { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); color: white; border: none; padding: 12px 25px; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 1em; font-weight: 600; transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; margin-right: 10px; margin-bottom: 10px; } button:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.4); } button:active { transform: translateY(0); } .secondary-btn { background: #6c757d; } .secondary-btn:hover { box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(108, 117, 125, 0.4); } .analysis-result { background: white; border-left: 4px solid #667eea; padding: 15px; margin-top: 15px; border-radius: 6px; line-height: 1.6; } .heat-level { display: inline-block; padding: 5px 12px; border-radius: 20px; font-weight: bold; margin: 5px 0; font-size: 0.9em; } .heat-low { background: #d4edda; color: #155724; } .heat-medium { background: #fff3cd; color: #856404; } .heat-high { background: #f8d7da; color: #721c24; } .risk-highlight { background: #ffe0e0; padding: 10px; border-left: 3px solid #d32f2f; margin: 10px 0; border-radius: 4px; } .positive-suggestion { background: #e8f5e9; padding: 10px; border-left: 3px solid #4caf50; margin: 10px 0; border-radius: 4px; } .mediator-note { background: #e3f2fd; padding: 15px; border-left: 4px solid #2196f3; margin: 15px 0; border-radius: 6px; color: #1565c0; } .document-section { background: white; padding: 15px; margin: 15px 0; border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 6px; } .document-section h4 { color: #333; margin-bottom: 10px; } .document-text { color: #555; line-height: 1.8; font-size: 0.95em; } .tabs { display: flex; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 20px; border-bottom: 2px solid #e0e0e0; flex-wrap: wrap; } .tab { padding: 12px 20px; background: #f0f0f0; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 6px 6px 0 0; transition: all 0.3s; color: #666; } .tab.active { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); color: white; } .tab-content { display: none; } .tab-content.active { display: block; } .settlement-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 20px; margin-top: 20px; } .settlement-card { background: white; border: 1px solid #ddd; padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; } .settlement-card h4 { color: #333; margin-bottom: 10px; } .settlement-card p { color: #666; font-size: 0.95em; line-height: 1.6; } .print-button { background: #28a745; margin-top: 20px; } .print-button:hover { box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(40, 167, 69, 0.4); } .copy-button { background: #17a2b8; padding: 8px 15px; font-size: 0.9em; } .copy-button:hover { box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(23, 162, 184, 0.4); } .stats { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 15px; margin: 20px 0; } .stat-box { background: white; padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; text-align: center; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; } .stat-box .number { font-size: 1.8em; font-weight: bold; color: #667eea; } .stat-box .label { color: #666; font-size: 0.9em; margin-top: 5px; } .footer { background: #f8f9fa; padding: 20px; text-align: center; color: #666; border-top: 1px solid #e0e0e0; font-size: 0.9em; } .emoji-button { font-size: 1.2em; padding: 8px 12px; } .hidden { display: none; } @media print { body { background: white; padding: 0; } .container { box-shadow: none; } .tabs, button, textarea, input { display: none; } .document-section { page-break-inside: avoid; } }

⚖️ Sentira-Law

AI-Powered Emotional Legal Mediator

Resolve disputes peacefully, intelligently, and legally.

🔍 Emotional Analysis

Analyze Communication

Emotional Intensity Heat Map

The system will generate a heat map showing emotional escalation patterns.

🤝 The Bridge: Mediation

Neutral Settlement Proposal

Memorandum of Understanding

Generate a neutral MoU when parties have reached an agreement.

Disclaimer: Sentira-Law is an AI mediator for dispute resolution and de-escalation. It does not replace professional legal counsel. Always consult with a qualified lawyer before making final legal decisions.
